model_specification_line: smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible * post + age + I(age ** 2) + C(sex) + C(year) + C(statefip) + driverslicenses + instatetuition + statefinancialaid + higheredban + C(everify) + limiteverify + omnibus + C(task287g) + C(jail287g) + securecommunities + lfpr + unemp", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": sample["statefip"]})
